assertions.description: Output uses two-column table format with source translation and adapted dubbing line, including duration target and estimated syllable count per row
Every adapted line falls within approximately 10% of the stated duration target in syllable count, with no factual meaning changes
Output includes a prose summary noting lines processed, lines flagged, and any timing flags include specific reasons
Output contains three clearly labeled synopsis blocks: SHORT (under 60 words), MEDIUM (~100 words), and LONG (~250 words), each with word count noted
No synopsis uses production language ('the filmmakers show,' 'the camera follows') — all describe story, not production process
All three synopses are written in third person present tense and are tonally consistent with each other, plus a Next Step note is included
